import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      if has
        if neg
          result = list.push(result, 0 - cur)
        else
          result = list.push(result, cur)
        end
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45
      neg = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, 0 - cur)
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    mut new_result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for y in result
      if not inserted and x < y
        new_result = list.push(new_result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      new_result = list.push(new_result, y)
    end
    if not inserted
      new_result = list.push(new_result, x)
    end
    result = new_result
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let l1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let l2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let a = parse_line(l1)
  let b = parse_line(l2)
  let inter = intersect(a, b)
  let sorted = sort_list(inter)
  if list.len(sorted) == 0
    println("empty")
  else
    mut out = ""
    mut first = true
    for x in sorted
      if first
        out = "#{x}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{x}"
      end
    end
    println(out)
  end
end
